title: cyclamen balearicum subsp. creticum
intro: Cyclamen balearicum subsp. creticum is a sub-species of the perennial herb cyclamen balearicum, native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by heart-shaped leaves with silver markings and delicate white to pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Cyclamen balearicum subsp. creticum include relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as providing pain relief and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the roots, leaves, and flowers, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
